moments.author: Tiger Woods
moments.why: Tiger Woods shouting out Fleetwood’s Sun Day Red attire is unexpected, stylish, and creating buzz among golf fans everywhere.
moments.url: Golf Digest coverage of Tiger Woods’ post

moments.author: Mauricio Pochettino
moments.quote: His $499 blue Hugo Boss shirt went viral—sold out twice as USMNT coach wore it at the World Cup
moments.why: A coach’s sideline shirt turning into a fashion phenomenon speaks to cultural crossover and merch mania.
moments.url: Reuters coverage of Pochettino’s viral shirt

moments.author: Fekry MO
moments.quote: Video of heated clash between Dallas officer and Egypt staff—millions of views
moments.why: Wild confrontations at World Cup events go viral fast—everyone’s talking about it.
moments.url: Yahoo Sports article quoting FekryMoo’s post
